name: postgresql-mcp
description: Connect to your PostgreSQL database to query data and schemas.

metadata.short_description: Connect to your PostgreSQL database to query data and schemas
metadata.mesh_description: Connects to a PostgreSQL database, enabling users to query data and schemas. This integration provides a seamless way to interact with PostgreSQL databases directly. It supports various query operations, schema exploration, and data retrieval, making it ideal for AI-powered database management, data analysis, and automated reporting workflows.
